---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: mgillr
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Use Case

Describe the specific use case where this feature would be useful.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
